macro.title: loanDepot asks judge to toss West Capital Lending complaint
macro.what: loanDepot says WCL lacks standing under TILA and shows no lost customers, urging dismissal with prejudice in California federal court.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Builder confidence falls in July as affordability pressures persist
macro.what: Homebuilder confidence fell again in July as affordability pressures and economic uncertainty continued to weigh on demand, according to the National Association of Home Builders/W
macro.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
macro.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

macro.title: Pending Home Sales Slip Amid Stubbornly High Housing Costs, Economic Uncertainty
macro.what: Would-be sellers backed off, too, with new listings falling to their lowest level since the start of 2026
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates to Fall as Cooler-Than-Expected Inflation Report Lowers Odds of a July Fed Rate Hike
macro.what: Takeaway: Rates will fall today after an unexpectedly soft CPI inflation reading that will keep the Fed from hiking at the July 29th meeting
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Stanley Martin buying Holiday Builders highlights hyper-scale shift
housing.what: Homebuilding scale is arriving at the midway point through a structural inflection
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Cody Pearce returns to YES Communities as president
housing.what: YES Communities appointed manufactured housing industry veteran Cody Pearce as president to oversee daily operations.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Despite ROAD Act passing, no construction boom is coming
housing.what: Builder confidence is weak and permits and starts are falling, while completed supply is high, limiting a near-term building boom.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Atlantic Avenue posts 25% monthly gain, leads HECM broker endorsements in April
housing.what: Atlantic Avenue Mortgage led April HECM broker endorsements with 110 loans, followed by loanDepot, Caliver Beach and C2 Financial.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: The Home Search Landscape is Changing. If You’re Not on Redfin, You May Be Missing Homes for Sale.
housing.what: Traditionally, most homes for sale appear on all the major real estate portals the day they list
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Affordable, Inland College Towns Buck National Trends, Seeing Double-Digit Home Price Growth and Fast Sales
housing.what: Morgantown, WV, Syracuse, NY and Tuscaloosa, AL, lead U.S
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Better Weather Is the Top Reason Americans Are Planning Out-of-State Moves, Outranking Affordability
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Redfin Partners With The Weather Company to Bring Weather Data to Every Home Listing
housing.what: Homebuyers can now view temperature, precipitation, snowfall, humidity and UV index information on all for-sale listings When you’re buying a home, it’s about more than bedrooms, bathrooms and square footage
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
